text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my day off, I find myself strolling aimlessly through town when I
spot a familiar face.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh? If it isn't Trainer. Good day, what a lovely coincidence this is.
choice_data_list: Are you on your way somewhere?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I am. Ah, which reminds me. Trainer, if you happen to have time...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Would you like to accompany me to the amusement park?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You see, Father went out of his way to send me a pair of tickets, but I
nearly forgot about their expiration date.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee. I'm loath to admit it, but if you hadn't bumped into me, one
of the tickets would have gone to waste.
choice_data_list: That reminds me, isn't your father...
That reminds me, isn't your father...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes, Father operates an amusement park. Which means, I too am
quite acquainted with these kinds of places.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: That is why... Oh my, isn't this a perfect opportunity?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Teehee. Today, I'll be your guide for the day! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, the unusually insistent Mejiro Bright takes the lead and
guides me through the amusement park.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My, the wait for this ride... is expected to be one hour. Um, perhaps
that's a little too long?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Trainer, let us look for a different ride to enjoy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (The Mejiro Bright is worried about the time?!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My, this one has a 120-minute wait time... 120 minutes, which means
we'll have to wait two hours.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, we will have to forego this one as well. A two-hour
wait is double that of the previous ride's, after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this ride will take three hours... When you think about it, waiting
times at amusement parks are rather long, aren't they?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot a few rides with more reasonable waiting times, but it seems
like Bright is going out of her way to avoid those.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Efficiently enjoying an amusement park... It's harder than you'd think,
isn't it? Um, next up is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, Trainer! Look over there. That ride says it has a
fifteen-minute waiting time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, my cheers of joy quickly fade away as I realize why exactly
this ride has such a short waiting time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: CLICK... CLACK... CLICK... CLACK...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Here it comes... It's the big drop...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: CLACK!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: WHOOSH!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Whee, we're falling...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The ride we're on is called, "Extreme Revolution: Hell's Fury." It's
famous for being one of the most intense thrill rides around...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But thanks to testimonials like, "My eardrums burst," and, "I straight
up fainted," most people don't dare go near, let alone ride this beast
of a roller coaster.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Well, that was an experience I wouldn't mind not going through again. Getting off the ride, I sit down on the nearest bench and catch my breath.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, are you feeling okay? My, your eyes are spinning round and
round.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Um, I had hoped that taking an efficient route would give you the
most enjoyable experience.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
But it looks to me like you're even more fatigued than usual. Is
something the matter?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I let Bright know that just walking around the park and chatting is
already plenty fun for me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, is that so?
choice_data_list: Let's go on that ride next, it looks relaxing.
Let's go on that ride next, it looks relaxing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That ride... Ah, you mean the Ferris wheel. But what about the
hour-and-a-half waiting time?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
If we wait there, we'll likely not have any time left afterwards. Are you
okay with that?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I nod my head in agreement, Bright looks like she wants to say
something, but stops. And so, we go and line up for the Ferris wheel.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My, the sun has already set. Ah, but look down there. The park's
lights are all on now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It's so... beautiful. From up on this Ferris wheel, I can see everyone in
the park.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee... There's some guests riding that roller coaster from earlier.
And over there, I see a parade about to begin.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Everyone looks like they're having so much fun. I see the happy faces
of satisfied guests everywhere I look.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: And yes, of course, I, too, am content.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Trainer, thank you very much for today.
choice_data_list: I should be the one thanking you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You know... being a guide is harder than it looks. Even riding the
Ferris wheel was one of your ideas, not mine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: But... thanks to you, I'm so happy! I couldn't imagine a better evening.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Teehee. Even if we run into a roadblock, with the two of us
together, I feel as if we can overcome any hurdle.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Well then, let us head home. It's past my curfew, but we'll be fine if
it's the two of us.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Yes, as long as we apologize together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When we finally get back, the dorm leader gives us a lengthy lecture.
Still, it's a small price to pay for a fun day together with Bright!
